## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss hiring and onboarding process for new contractors/employees](https://fathom.video/share/msUr5ay83DzsCY3yzTpEXENpRaruFzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New hires will likely be brought on initially as contractors, with potential to convert to full-time employees later](https://fathom.video/share/msUr5ay83DzsCY3yzTpEXENpRaruFzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Need to clarify policies around holidays, PTO, benefits for contractors vs. employees](https://fathom.video/share/msUr5ay83DzsCY3yzTpEXENpRaruFzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Prioritizing finding talented candidates who can handle timezone differences](https://fathom.video/share/msUr5ay83DzsCY3yzTpEXENpRaruFzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Utilizing assessments and interviews to evaluate candidates' skills and fit](https://fathom.video/share/msUr5ay83DzsCY3yzTpEXENpRaruFzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Topics

### Contractor vs Employee Status

  - [New hires will likely start as contractors through Remote.com, with option to convert to employees later](https://fathom.video/share/msUr5ay83DzsCY3yzTpEXENpRaruFzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Need to clarify policies on holidays, PTO, benefits for contractors](https://fathom.video/share/msUr5ay83DzsCY3yzTpEXENpRaruFzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Typically contractors in US don't get PTO, but open to offering it to attract talent](https://fathom.video/share/msUr5ay83DzsCY3yzTpEXENpRaruFzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)

### Timezone Differences

  - [Prioritizing candidates who can have 4-5 hour overlap with US timezones for client-facing roles](https://fathom.video/share/msUr5ay83DzsCY3yzTpEXENpRaruFzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Flexible to hire for different timezones for non-client roles](https://fathom.video/share/msUr5ay83DzsCY3yzTpEXENpRaruFzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Positioning timezone differences as opportunity for exposure to top startups](https://fathom.video/share/msUr5ay83DzsCY3yzTpEXENpRaruFzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)

### Hiring Process

  - [Utilizing assessments to evaluate writing skills - may need to clarify expectations](https://fathom.video/share/msUr5ay83DzsCY3yzTpEXENpRaruFzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
  - [Tracking candidates who are good fits but eliminated due to timezone issues](https://fathom.video/share/msUr5ay83DzsCY3yzTpEXENpRaruFzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [Getting salary expectations upfront from strong candidates](https://fathom.video/share/msUr5ay83DzsCY3yzTpEXENpRaruFzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

### Specific Candidates Discussed

  - [Melina (Serbia) - Concerned about timezone, waiting on her decision](https://fathom.video/share/msUr5ay83DzsCY3yzTpEXENpRaruFzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Bisera (Macedonia) - Potential 3-month contractor trial](https://fathom.video/share/msUr5ay83DzsCY3yzTpEXENpRaruFzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Clarify policies on holidays, PTO, benefits for contractors through Remote.com](https://fathom.video/share/msUr5ay83DzsCY3yzTpEXENpRaruFzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Refine assessment instructions to set clearer expectations](https://fathom.video/share/msUr5ay83DzsCY3yzTpEXENpRaruFzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
  - [Continue interviews and follow up on specific candidates discussed](https://fathom.video/share/msUr5ay83DzsCY3yzTpEXENpRaruFzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Explore options for physical "mute" reminder accessories](https://fathom.video/share/msUr5ay83DzsCY3yzTpEXENpRaruFzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
